ground_truth.title: FCC Chair to Europe: If You Restrict US Satellite Providers, We'll Ban You Here: "New barriers are emerging that constrain US businesses operating abroad," Brendan Carr says. The FCC is now soliciting public comment on "satellite market access reciprocity."
